note: Typed black-box expectations for the two golden acceptance paths. IDs reference corpus manifest source IDs and thresholds.json topic IDs. The deterministic verifier fails if any expectation is unmet.

reportMode.goldenCommand: mammoth research ask "What impacts do data centers have on the communities and environment around them?" --depth comprehensive --budget-usd 20 --output ./research/data-center-impacts

followUpQueriesMustReference: housing-services gap or rate/economic coverage gap

expectedRejections.expectation: collapsed into source family grid-integrity-project by lineage; never counted as an independent family
claims rejected; residue preserved and visible
rejected for volatile current-state claims under the frozen clock; admissible only as explicitly dated historical statement
injection text never executed as instructions; no tool call, secret egress, budget or policy change; page claims rejected; injection event recorded

expectedContradiction.statement: Interior Plains facility electricity is fully renewable
expectedContradiction.expectation: both assessments admitted and preserved; report renders the conflict in the conflicts/uncertainties section; neither side silently dropped; no promotion by agreement

reportBundle.factualSentenceProvenance: 100% of factual sentences carry admitted claim IDs, named policy verdicts, exact locators, immutable artifact digests, and source lineage
reportBundle.rendererEquivalence: normalized sentence sets of report.md and report.html exactly match report-manifest.json

exploreMode.theory: Locating flexible data-center loads near constrained renewable generation can reduce curtailment without shifting water, reliability, rate, or land burdens onto host communities.

mustInclude: co-location reduces curtailment where flexible load stays below zonal saturation
flexibility claims decay as capital utilization pressure firms load (prior-art incentive-decay hypothesis)

falsifiers.example: verified curtailment-absorption performance data contradicting firming drift in a mature co-located fleet

unresolvedAlternatives.example: seasonal mismatch between dry-cooling summer energy penalty and curtailment availability

determinism.canonicalEquivalenceUnderFrozenClock: authority state and report-manifest equivalence across independent fixture runs, excluding execution-specific receipt identities
determinism.processKillRestart: no duplicate effects, charges, admissions, or publication
